description: Style NoteLook adorable in this pair of classic sandals from carlton london. Slip into them with a flowy dress and a shoulder bag, and enjoy those shopping sprees in the winter sun in comfort and style.Product DetailsCream sandal with a strap on the forefoot with a buckle detail and an ankle strap with a tang claspSoft footbed with branding embossed on the heel counterTextured rubber outsole with a wedge heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3"
